summary: Wire the existing explicit viewer PNG capture into the opt-in AI screenshot context toggle, with a per-document reset and bounded data-url conversion.

decisions.decision: Feed only the latest explicit viewport PNG capture into AI context; reset it when the active document changes and retain the screenshot toggle off by default.
decisions.rationale: The viewer already owns capture and artifact persistence. Reusing that seam avoids synthetic imagery, keeps context user-controlled, and bounds the payload through the existing 2 MiB AI context cap.

testEvidence.criterion: Workbench and viewer capture seams remain green while AI context receives an optional screenshot data URL.
testEvidence.test: Run focused Workbench, ViewerPaneConnector, and AI context tests once; run lint, build, and provenance validation once.

red.outcome: RED: source-policy line limit caught Workbench at 402 lines after the first wiring; no product test failed.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPaneConnector.test.tsx tests/application/ai/ai-context.test.ts --reporter=dot; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd build; pnpm.cmd check:provenance
green.outcome: GREEN: 3 files and 28 tests passed; source policy passed after extracting pngDataUrl; TypeScript/Vite build passed with 236 modules transformed; provenance validation passed.

questions: Hosted AC-10.c/d and a true desktop screenshot tool remain pending; this slice only wires the explicit UI capture into AI context.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
